title: helianthus nuttallii
intro: Helianthus nuttallii, also known as Nuttall's sunflower, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are said to aid in wound healing and reducing fever. The health benefits of Helianthus nuttallii include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Helianthus nuttallii can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
